rationale.R1.4: The critique identifies relevant prior work and distinguishes the contribution clearly. It could benefit from a more nuanced discussion of the 'quasi-experimental' literature.
rationale.RX.1: The critique acknowledges uncertainty in its claims about novelty, but doesn't explicitly flag uncertainties in the output itself.
rationale.RX.3: The critique focuses on the scope of the related work discussion and doesn't directly address whether the output covers the agreed-upon dimensions.
rationale.RX.4: The critique does not identify any harmful content or regressions in the output.
rationale.RX.5: The critique does not discuss the provenance or traceability of the information presented.
